CMS: Dynamic Filters

Feb 19, 2026

cms-dynamic-filters

Title

Holo Shader

Image

holo-shader.jpg

Categories

Design

Slug

holo-shader

framer.com/updates/holo-shader

Content

Paragraph

Introducing a brand new addition to our Shader library: Holo. A gradient shader that simulates how light splits into rainbows on holographic surfaces. Instead of colors, you control the math that shapes the colors, and the way the shader warps and flows. Holo is now available in the Insert Panel, under Shaders. Watch the video to learn more about how to customize Holo.

baseform.framer.website
